data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Virtual queue position' but did not provide any evidence confirming that this specific requirement is covered. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving a virtual waiting room, it does not explicitly confirm the ability to read or validate the virtual queue position through API reads or persisted state checks. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the ability to read or validate the virtual queue position.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
